title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building control layers around AI models for coding agents, split into session-level rules and skills plus multi-session orchestration. The harness comprises roughly 98% of a production agent like Claude Code, with the key leverage in coordinating multiple focused agent sessions into reliable workflows.
